ApiError.description:
The shared, transport-neutral error shape.

Every crate reports failures as an `ApiError` so CLI, REST, MCP, jobs, logs,
and progress streams render one consistent structure.

details.description: Redacted structured context (safe key/value pairs only).

visibility.description: Where this error may be surfaced.

ApiError.title: ApiError

ApiError_ErrorSeverity.description: How severe an error is and whether it terminates the item/job.

oneOf.description: Non-fatal issue, full behavior preserved; not terminal.
Behavior reduced but acceptable by policy; may or may not be terminal.
Required work failed; terminal for the affected item/job.

ApiError_ErrorStage.description: Pipeline/transport stage an error is attributed to.

oneOf.description: Missing fields, bad types, unsupported flags.

ApiError_ErrorVisibility.description:
Where a context entry (or error) may be surfaced.

From the "visibility" field in the error shape: `public`, `internal`,
`sensitive`.

oneOf.description: Safe to render to any caller, including remote/unauthenticated.
Internal diagnostics; render only to internal/admin surfaces.
Sensitive/secret-adjacent; never render raw, redaction required.
